summary: This is a joke post consisting entirely of the word 'Dave' repeated dozens of times as hyperlinks, all pointing to Dave Winer's Scripting News blog, ending with a single 'Malkovitch' link. It is a reference to the film 'Being John Malkovich,' where characters can only say 'Malkovich,' applied here as a humorous jab at Dave Winer. The post has no substantive argument or technical content. It appears to be a playful commentary on the early-2000s blogging culture and Joel's relationship with Dave Winer.
key_points: The post is a deliberate joke referencing the movie 'Being John Malkovich'
Every link points to Dave Winer's Scripting News, suggesting an obsessive or satirical fixation
The 'Malkovitch' punchline at the end reframes the entire post as a movie parody
It reflects the informal, personality-driven culture of early blogging
money_quotes: Dave Dave Dave Dave Dave Dave Dave Dave Dave Malkovitch
key_insight: A zero-content joke post parodying 'Being John Malkovich' by replacing every word with links to Dave Winer's blog, illustrating the playful interpersonal dynamics of early-2000s blogging culture.
